author: cms-tsg-storm
body:
#### PR description:

Development of HLT menus for `CMSSW_16_0_X` (branch `CMSSW_17_0_X`): 
   * This is the PR for the master branch, which will then be backported down to `16_0_X` (the latter is the release cycle targeted to be used for Run-3 HLT-menu development in 2026).
   
These updates correspond to the updates corresponding to the third version **"V1.2"** of the `GRun` menu for the 2026 pp data-taking.
This update includes the integration of the following JIRA tickets:
- [CMSHLT-3788](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3788) [DQM,NGT] Adding triggerTriggerEvent branch to `hltOutputDQMTestDataScouting`
- [CMSHLT-3797](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3797) [ECAL] Add ECAL calibration stream(s) to the TrackerVR menu
- [CMSHLT-3810](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3810) [HIN,TRK] Removal of the D meson triggers from the HIon menu
- [CMSHLT-3813](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3813) [HIN] Muon-jet trigger paths for HIon menu
- [CMSHLT-3814](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3814) [HIN,TRK] Update the layer list in the `hltPixelLayerTripletsForUPCPPOnAA` module
- [CMSHLT-3818](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3818) [SMP] Backport of changes on top of STORM menu as run in the 2026 low-PU run
- [CMSHLT-3820](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3820) [PF] Integrate Alpaka-based hadronic multi-depth PF clustering

In addition this PR introduces the following commits:
- bfee1e26730 add a customization function to ignore all filters in the HLT menu from `cmsDriver` command
- 99b899209ae Removal of customisation functions integrated in the menus
- 353e71731ad remove frozen menu 2026 v1.1 and introduce new frozen menu 2026 v1.2
- 5c1f557cb6a smart path versioning for `GRun` 2026 V1.2
- 802c7887c85 update of HIon L1T menu in TSG GTs to `L1Menu_CollisionsHeavyIons2026_v1_0_1_xml`
- 3982d2c77a6 update makeOnlineSpecial to 2026 V1.1

#### PR validation:

TSG Integration tests.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Not a backport, it will be backported to `CMSSW_16_0_X` which is the current TSG development cycle.
title: HLT menu development for `16_0_X` (5/N) [`17_0_X`]
